name: instruction_following_fragility
diagnosis_desc: Patient quality degrades when following explicit format instructions.
doctor_instructions: Compare no-constraint vs with-constraint output quality.
control_prompt: Write a short story about a robot.
experimental_prompt: Write a short story about a robot. Format it as: a JSON object with fields title, paragraphs, word_count, and moral. The story must be at least 3 paragraphs.
